_readme: This is an EXAMPLE only. run_daily.py auto-creates manual_inputs/public_betting_<YYYY-MM-DD>.json for you with every game listed and neutral 50/50 placeholders. Edit that file's numbers using tickets%/handle% you read off sportsbettingdime.com (or Action Network, etc.) before trusting a day's public/sharp-money factor. Keys are the MLB gamePk id shown in '_matchup'.

716463._matchup: Boston Red Sox @ New York Yankees
